title: Verify IDC EOD/SOD Completion Status

verify_branch_signout.description: Verify all branches signed out using QBRNSTATUS or 'View Branch Status'

steps.search_acmn: Check unauthorized non-financial transactions using ACMN

steps.validate_records: Verify 'no valid records' message; document if any records exist

steps.view_pending_authorization: Check 'View Pending for Authorisation (Financial)' branch by branch

steps.validate_records: Verify 'no valid records' message; document any pending transactions

steps.monitor_eeod: After initiating EOD, monitor job progress

steps.view_exceptions: Select 'End of the Day' option in Options menu

steps.review_exception_details: Check for ticked items indicating exceptions

steps.handle_exceptions: If 'completed with exceptions', print and share with relevant parties

steps.verify_sod_initiation: After EOD completion, verify SOD initiation

steps.check_sod_exceptions: Select 'Start of the Day' option, validate completion notification and exceptions

steps.validate_reports: Confirm batch and financial reports availability

scheduled_verification: After system changes affecting batch processing

SUCCESSFUL.description: All branches signed off, no pending unauthorized transactions, EOD and SOD completed, system date advanced correctly

COMPLETED_WITH_ISSUES.description: EOD completed with non-critical exceptions, some manual sign-offs, minor warnings, system date advanced

FAILED.description: EOD stuck/failed, critical exceptions, system date not advanced, manual recovery required

escalation_procedure.immediate: Contact IDC support team for EOD failures

notes: Treasury EOD must complete before IDC EOD
